name: Arta Hoxha
bio: Arta has supported hundreds of families through the birth process and postnatal period with care and expertise.

name: Dr. Klara Berisha
bio: Specializing in perinatal mental health, Dr. Berisha offers support for emotional and psychological issues.

name: Luana Shala
bio: Luana creates personalized nutrition plans for pregnant women and new mothers for optimal health.

name: Dorina Meta
bio: With a passion for infant care, Dorina helps new parents navigate the first months with their babies.

name: Fjona Dervishi
bio: Fjona combines her yoga expertise with pregnancy knowledge to create safe and relaxing sessions.
